abilities.description: When you consume the mystical essence of your surroundings, roll +wits. On a strong hit, add the value of your action die to your essence track (max 6). You may then @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.a2d7793b23c17489]{Secure an Advantage}, @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.e6ed148eff82c171]{Face Danger}, @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.3f5a834fa3fea5d1]{Gain Ground}, or @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.d9208f9b7d827aec]{React Under Attack} +essence to create minor mystical effects or illusions. On a hit, suffer -1 essence and take +1 momentum.
You may @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.9f538fabf8998c5b]{Compel} +essence (and suffer -1 essence) through a show of power.
When you perform this ritual, add +1 and take +1 essence on a hit.
